raw_response: The ASUS ZenBook 14 is an excellent choice for a budget-conscious student. It offers a remarkable OLED display and lightweight design at under $900, making it highly cost-effective. With 16GB RAM and a decent Intel Core Ultra 5 processor, it handles everyday tasks smoothly. Though the speakers are weak and there's no upgrade path for RAM, its battery life of up to 13 hours is impressive.
